title: Furniture Varnisher #81366
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Furniture and home furnishing industry
  • Position Title: Furniture Varnisher
  • Working Location: Redhill
  • Working Hours: Monday – Saturday (9:30 AM – 6:00 PM)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary + Allowances + Performance Bonus + Medical benefits
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Perform wood finishing work for furniture and home furnishing items, including varnishing, staining, and lacquer finishing.
  • Mix lacquer and colour pigments to achieve the required colour and finish, based on samples or specifications.
  • Prepare surfaces before finishing (e.g., sanding, cleaning, filling minor defects) to ensure smooth results.
  • Apply finishing coats using appropriate methods (e.g., spray gun, brush, wiping) and maintain consistent quality.
  • Check completed work for colour accuracy, smoothness, and defects, and carry out touch-ups when needed.
  • Maintain and clean tools and equipment (e.g., spray guns, compressors) and keep the work area tidy.
  • Follow workplace safety procedures and handle paints, thinners, and chemicals properly.
  • Work with the production/team lead to meet daily output and quality requirements.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • At least 3 years of relevant experience in furniture varnishing/wood finishing.
  • Able to mix lacquer to achieve the desired colour and finish (colour matching is required).
  • Good knowledge of wood finishing processes (e.g., sanding, staining, sealing, top coating, touch-up).
  • Able to use finishing tools and equipment safely (e.g., spray gun and related equipment).
  • Able to follow work instructions and quality standards.
  • Team player with a responsible work attitude.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81366 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
